name: Schultz Industries Inc.
message: Schultz Industries Inc.Schultz Industries, Inc. is lacally owned and operated complete landscape maintenance and installation company. Our focus is commercial properties such as retail centers, apartment complexes, office parks, municipalities and homeowner associations.Our employees are professionally certified in arboriculture, chamical application, irrigation audits, and many other specialties. They are also trained on new topics every week, and of coarse they are reminded every day of our company's mission statement:"Every employee committed to exceeding the client expecations"Geo: USA - Leak size: 61 GB Archive - Contains: Files
